spotChecks.notes: Confirmed GET /api/issues/{issueId} still uses the existing issue-detail call plus a separate GitLab /resource_label_events call on the configured project. The mapper preserves GitLab ordering, maps changeType from action, and forces change.field to label via LabelChange.

Confirmed component coverage asserts 502 with no issue payload when label-events fails and confirms label-events is not called after issue-detail 404. Confirmed existing smoke scenario asserts changeSets == '#[]' on GET /api/issues/{issueId}.

redCardHistory.reason: Initial Phase 2 review failed on incomplete context-map coverage and an implementation-report deviation contradiction.
redCardHistory.actionTaken: Routed exact blocker evidence back to Java Coder for documentation/report remediation, reran scripts/final-check.sh, refreshed the Phase 2 brief, and obtained Reviewer approval on rerun.

smokeCheckEvidence.summary: Karate started flow-orchestrator with the local profile, ran against http://localhost:8080, and passed all 6 features and all 17 scenarios, including issues-get-single.feature 3/3 scenarios.

teamLeadRechecks: Batch 1 scripts/final-check.sh PASS: BUILD SUCCESS, tests=105, zero checkstyle/PMD/CPD/SpotBugs findings.
Final implementation batch scripts/final-check.sh PASS at 2026-04-08T17:18:48+02:00: surefire=110, failsafe=35, all quality gates PASS.
Remediation batch scripts/final-check.sh PASS at 2026-04-08T17:37:07+02:00: surefire=110, failsafe=35, all quality gates PASS.
scripts/karate-test.sh PASS at 2026-04-08T17:19:38+02:00: features=6, scenarios=17, application started and stopped by the script.

deviationsAndApprovals: Approved minor deviation: issues-get-single.feature was not extended with a new non-smoke scenario because the existing @smoke scenario already validates changeSets == '#[]' on GET /api/issues/{issueId}; the deviation is documented consistently in the implementation report and Phase 2 brief.
documentationReview: flow-orchestrator/http/issues.http documents the single-issue GET example and the changeSets shape note.
documentation/context-map.md now includes the 5 new orchestration model types, the 4 new IssueDetailDto inner types, and LabelChangeSetTest, aligning the capability map with the delivered code.
risksAndFollowUp: The approved Karate deviation leaves populated changeSets validated at component level rather than with a dedicated new Karate scenario; this is acceptable for this story but is a natural future hardening target if smoke coverage is expanded.

finalDecision.reason: Requirement lock, story, plan, implementation, reviewer gates, Team Lead audit, documentation updates, quality reports, and Karate smoke evidence are aligned and complete for label-events-api, with one minor approved deviation recorded consistently.
